title: eritrichium nanum var. jankae
intro: Eritrichium nanum var. jankae, also known as Jankae's dwarf erythrichium, is a rare alpine plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eritrichium nanum var. jankae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial effects. Eritrichium nanum var. jankae is commonly prepared as a tincture or infusion in herbal medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
